creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cvsup'd my RELENG_7 box around 10:30 am US/Central (UTC-5) from
cvsup5.us.freebsd.org, and rebuilt world/kernel, and can NOT reproduce
your problem with either the 4.80,2 (Current, in tree) version of
sysutils/lsof or with the 4.81A,2 (just submitted) version.

Please check that you have a valid system source tree that matches your
kernel.

Thanks!


-- 
Larry Rosenman                     http://www.lerctr.org/~ler
